arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kendra index.

capacity_units.description: The capacity units allocated for the Kendra index, including query and storage units.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the Kendra index was created.

description.description: A description of the Kendra index.

document_metadata_configuration_updates.description: Updates to the document metadata configuration for the Kendra index, including relevance and search settings.

edition.description: The edition of the Kendra index, which can affect capacity and pricing.

error_message.description: Any error messages associated with the Kendra index.

index_statistics.description: Statistics about the Kendra index, including the number of indexed FAQs and text documents.

name.description: The name of the Kendra index.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role used by the Kendra index.

server_side_encryption_configuration.description: Configuration for server-side encryption, including the KMS key ID.

status.description: The current status of the Kendra index, such as 'ACTIVE' or 'FAILED'.

tags.description: Tags associated with the Kendra index for categorization and management.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the Kendra index was last updated.

user_context_policy.description: The policy governing user context data for the Kendra index.

user_group_resolution_configuration.description: Configuration for resolving user groups within the Kendra index.

user_token_configurations.description: Configurations for user token types, including JSON and JWT tokens, for authentication and access control.
